110754.explanation: Agreed, as much as possible. The board should reflect society, and this is also better for good teamwork.

110755.explanation: Participation is very important, but sometimes a referendum is less suitable than, for example, a survey or consultation.

110756.explanation: Municipal support is important, but community and ownership can work very well.

110758.explanation: Disagree, not always. In or near nature areas, shops and campsites are not always desirable.

110759.explanation: Agreed, this should be encouraged because it concerns own initiative and contributes naturally to environmental goals.

110762.explanation: We are proud that Bloemendaal has an asylum seekers' center (in Aerdenhout) and believe we must continue to take responsibility.

110767.explanation: For now, we think this can be unifying and emphasize the ban on setting off individual fireworks, but in the long term, we should actually eliminate such (air) pollution.

110768.explanation: The need is not very great, it will lead to increased costs for residents, and it does not encourage reuse either. Taking items to the depot (2) works well.

110771.explanation: We must preserve open spaces and green areas as much as possible.

110772.explanation: Bloemendaal already does this and should definitely continue to do so. Some sports clubs also have their own budgets for this, by the way.

110775.explanation: In Bloemendaal, this is arranged through the music school.

110778.explanation: Fortunately, insecurity is not a major issue in Bloemendaal.

110779.explanation: Disagree, fortunately insecurity is not a major issue in Bloemendaal.

110781.explanation: The housing shortage is significant, especially for young people, and young people are also welcome in our municipality!

110785.explanation: Tailored solutions. If it does not come at the expense of nature and openness and fits in, it can be done, but we prioritize building in the centers.

110786.explanation: Working contributes to integration and mental health.

110790.explanation: Agree, greening the vehicle fleet greatly contributes to cleaner air and a better living environment.

110792.explanation: Disagree, care is too important to make it personal or, for example, related to origin. Integration and freedom are central.

110793.explanation: Disagree, it's obviously about good help/care! If more effective care works better, then it may cost more.

110806.explanation: But along Randweg, where it fits the environment and does not come at the expense of sightlines and nature, we have no objection.

110809.explanation: Disagree, with car sharing and for example improved cycling facilities, car use and street space for cars can be limited. That space can benefit playing children or green areas.

110811.explanation: Yes, all buildings must be made sustainable, but not realistic by 2030.

110812.explanation: This quickly provides extra living space which is needed given the huge demand for housing!

110813.explanation: Agree, clean air is important for health. Many people suffer severe complaints due to wood burning. Wood burning is also not necessary for heating.

110754.explanation: For the VVD, the quality and competence of aldermen and the mayor come first. That must be leading. However, the VVD believes that the council should be as representative as possible, so a good distribution is indeed important.

110755.explanation: The VVD values elected representatives close to residents. Referendums often only elicit reactions from a small group of stakeholders and give a distorted picture. Better involvement can be achieved through consultation, participation, and surveys. Let's use those tools properly first.

110756.explanation: Certain tasks, such as maintenance of public greenery and municipal facilities, belong to the municipality so that all residents have a say over these spaces.

110758.explanation: The VVD believes each farm and location has its own pros and cons. Therefore, allowing shops, a campsite, or other activities not directly related to the farm is always a matter of tailored solutions.

110759.explanation: The municipality will face major financial challenges in the coming years. Additional subsidies, beyond existing national schemes, for sustainable energy generation would directly come at the expense of other municipal tasks or result in higher taxes for our residents.

110762.explanation: The VVD has always supported accommodating asylum seekers and has done so in Bloemendaal as well. Locations have been offered to the COA, but they were declined. As far as the VVD is concerned, there are currently no other locations in Bloemendaal suitable for an AZC.

110767.explanation: Organizing a fireworks show is not a core municipal task. However, the municipality can of course consider issuing a permit if an initiative to organize a fireworks show comes from residents and/or entrepreneurs.

110768.explanation: The fee for collecting bulky waste in Bloemendaal should cover the collection costs, but should not generate extra income for the municipality.

110771.explanation: What is green must remain green; housing development requires tailored solutions and must not affect the village character.

110772.explanation: The municipality supports low-income residents where necessary, but expanding regulations is not needed; current support is sufficient.

110775.explanation: Music education is important for culture and social development; support through the music school remains assured.

110778.explanation: Safety is, according to the VVD, the most important core task of the municipality; additional enforcement officers contribute to this.

110779.explanation: Safety is a top priority, but the use of cameras in public spaces also rightly raises privacy questions; a careful assessment must be made per case.

110781.explanation: This is not a municipal task. Loans can already be obtained through various credit providers (banks); this task is already assigned to SVn.

110785.explanation: Protecting the village and green character of our municipality is paramount.

110786.explanation: This promotes personal responsibility and participation, but of course only applies to residents who are able to contribute.

110790.explanation: The number of electric vehicles is increasing, so the number of charging points must also increase. There must always be a well-considered decision about where charging spots should be, as parking must remain possible for everyone.

110792.explanation: Freedom of choice in care is important, provided quality and accessibility are guaranteed.

110793.explanation: Quality and effectiveness come first; price is secondary.

110805.explanation: Provision of affordable housing protects the village character and ensures local involvement.

110806.explanation: The character of our villages must be preserved.

110809.explanation: Being able to park in your own neighborhood increases livability; where necessary and possible, the number of parking spaces should be increased.

110811.explanation: Sustainability is pursued through the Integral Housing Plan; the ambition is good, but it is not feasible to make all school buildings sustainable by 2030.

110812.explanation: Protection of housing quality and livability is paramount; strict rules remain necessary.

110813.explanation: Heating is permitted, provided it is used responsibly; health nuisances can be limited through advice.

110754.explanation: This question cannot be properly answered for a small municipality like Bloemendaal as we have very few aldermen (two to three). We advocate for deleting this question. It is likely that there will be a coalition.

110755.explanation: D66 is not against referendums, but opposes the general application of this instrument for (all) important issues. Also, municipal capacity is limited. There are multiple instruments to give residents influence on policy. Each situation should be assessed to determine what works best.

110756.explanation: This should be possible under conditions, such as based on clear agreements and a citizen organization that guarantees some form of continuity.

110758.explanation: The municipal council is responsible for spatial planning. Allowing campgrounds without limits could come at the expense of nature and/or landscape. Perhaps under conditions and in special cases; a store for own products should be allowed sooner than an unlimited campground.

110759.explanation: A form of stimulation and technical support is conceivable, but the amount of financial aid should remain limited, since this is not a municipal task and not everyone can benefit from it.

110762.explanation: The municipality must fulfill its social responsibility and legal obligation. Therefore, when a claim is made on the municipality on this basis, an asylum seeker center (AZC) must be added. We advocate deleting this question.

110767.explanation: The preference is to leave this to citizen initiatives per district. There are doubts about the municipality's suitability for organizing this. Costs also play a role, especially if it had to take place in every district.

110768.explanation: The municipality has good policy (small contribution for collection) and collection points where bulky waste can be brought free of charge.

110771.explanation: Where building houses is allowed or not is determined in the environmental plan.

110775.explanation: The municipality already supports/finances the music school. We make it more accessible to all primary school children. Important for the development of children.

110778.explanation: There are currently sufficient enforcement officers (BOAs).

110779.explanation: Enforcement of 30 KM zones and around schools. Camera surveillance increases effectiveness of enforcement. Less strain on BOA capacity.

110781.explanation: The municipality has no financial room for that and is not the appropriate authority.

110785.explanation: The statement is unclear; is “built-up area” or existing urban area meant? We follow the Environmental Act in the consideration.

110786.explanation: National policy is directive in this. We advocate deleting this question.

110790.explanation: The current plan for rolling out charging stations (thus more parking spaces as charging points) must remain unchanged.

110806.explanation: What is meant by tall? Tower blocks do not fit in spatial planning policy, but Bloemendaal has many examples of multi-story residences.

110809.explanation: There is generally no parking problem in the neighborhoods.

110811.explanation: We adhere to the IHP, which states that in the first phase (2026-2030), less than half of the school buildings will be sustainable.

110812.explanation: The current rules for splitting houses have been relaxed, but if the housing shortage continues, it might be necessary to relax them further. We await the evaluation of the current (relaxed) rules.

110813.explanation: Relying on residents is sufficient. Prohibiting goes too far. D66 did not support a motion with this intent.

110754.explanation: Man or woman, it matters that the alderman lives in the municipality, is committed to our municipality, and then the fact whether someone is male or female is less important. It would be nice if the council has a balanced composition, but that applies to everything, such as age etc.

110755.explanation: Important topics such as waste collection, whether or not an AZC, whether or not merging schools at one location, should involve public consultation.

110756.explanation: Citizen initiatives are fantastic tools to involve people in governance, but it is not always possible. If you organize this, conditions like safety, continuity, compliance monitoring and sufficient democratic mandate must be considered.

110758.explanation: We hold farmers close to our hearts in our municipality because of a centuries-old culture and because they maintain the beauty of the landscape we enjoy. Always allowing a campground or store is not good justification for spatial development. Nature and animal welfare are important.

110759.explanation: Sustainability is a broad concept. The key is to embrace initiatives that are promising, and the municipality can facilitate to help residents make this possible. Financial support should primarily come from The Hague.

110762.explanation: There is already an AZC for minor asylum seekers. There has been much nuisance there. The COA cannot handle it. The neighborhood often feels unheard. Currently, it is manageable. We are not in favor of another AZC. The municipality is already accommodating many Ukrainians. There are not enough homes.

110767.explanation: That would be good if it would deter people from setting off fireworks privately. Fireworks set off privately cause much suffering, hospital admissions, animal distress, pollution. Let’s meet each other at a professionally organized fireworks display by the municipality.

110768.explanation: The recycling centers in Overveen and Heemstede are excellently organized and accessible. If some residents cannot manage, they can be helped by family, neighbors, or volunteers to bring bulky waste.

110771.explanation: This statement is too general. If a house is demolished, in our view a new house can be built according to the Environmental Plan. Building houses on farmland is not possible in our opinion unless there is a desired spatial development and it is not a Natura 2000 area.

110772.explanation: The standard reimbursement for membership is not a good proposal because not everyone is the same and not everyone needs this, furthermore, there are different circumstances. For children below the poverty line, this would be a good idea.

110775.explanation: The municipality maintains the music school but subsidies for all children are not necessary. It is up to the children and parents themselves. Music is very important for a child's development. It should be encouraged, both at school and home, and the municipality can promote this more.

110778.explanation: Safety is very important. Our focus is on traffic safety (fatbikes, dangerous traffic spots for vulnerable road users). Also at supermarkets where there have recently been violent incidents and theft.

110779.explanation: At some stores or locations this is important. For example, at the AH in Bennebroek. In notorious places, camera surveillance could help. Lighting is also important.

110781.explanation: This is not the task of the municipality. The municipality is not a credit institution.

110785.explanation: That depends on the environmental plan and environmental vision. It also depends on the quality of the area and whether a desirable spatial development is involved. Building in Natura2000 areas is not desired.

110786.explanation: The municipality can encourage people, but making it obligatory is undesirable. Motivation differs from person to person, and what is socially meaningful? That is also subject to different judgments. Moreover, not everyone is able to provide this mentally or physically.

110790.explanation: That depends on the need and the space available. A proper balance, good monitoring, and neighborhood participation in areas where parking space is scarce are important.

110792.explanation: The preference cannot always be realized. If you need care, it is important that care can be provided. That takes precedence over religion, culture, or belief.

110793.explanation: Youth care has become unaffordable. Price is an important selection criterion, especially for those who seriously need care, because if it increases further, people with the greatest care needs face the highest risk of running out of money and that care not being available.

110805.explanation: This is necessary because there is a shortage of social rental housing in Bloemendaal. Moreover, these homes are urgently needed for our own facilities. Teachers, care personnel, etc., need affordable rental housing near their work.

110806.explanation: More? There is not a single high residential tower. This is not an objective either. However, the alderman from the PvdA proposed building 120 homes in two high residential towers at Blekersveld. That plan was dismissed by D66, VVD, and CDA. Why is unclear. There were rumors circulating.

110809.explanation: Only if this is possible, there is space, it does not come at the expense of other qualities, and it can count on support.

110811.explanation: That is unfeasible because it is financially and organizationally impossible.

110812.explanation: Subdivision is one of the options to help reduce housing shortages, but not as an obligation, rather as a possibility and under strict conditions. We have been fighting for this for years.

110813.explanation: This is important due to public health. Also think of children and patients suffering from cardiovascular diseases, people with asthma. These people also have the right to live. We can certainly be a little more considerate of others.

110754.explanation: Equal distribution in case of equal suitability.

110755.explanation: There are several ways to include residents' opinions in decision-making.

110756.explanation: CDA stimulates the involvement of residents.

110759.explanation: This is already the case through our sustainability program.

110771.explanation: Provided it fits within the destination and environmental plan.

110772.explanation: CDA finds it important that everyone can participate regardless of economic situation.

110775.explanation: This can be done via our municipal music school.

110778.explanation: We already have good BOAs (special enforcement officers) who can handle this if necessary.

110779.explanation: There are already many private individuals with door cameras. From a privacy perspective, more camera surveillance is not desirable.

110781.explanation: For starters and certainly the unlucky generation, a solution. Everyone deserves a good start.

110785.explanation: CDA supports expansion and is against infill development.

110786.explanation: This already happens through Spaarne Werkt, for example.

110793.explanation: Price is certainly important, but quality comes first.

110806.explanation: Does not fit the Bloemendaal image.

110809.explanation: Cars do not have to be parked directly in front of the door if there is parking nearby.

110811.explanation: Half is not possible; the current policy is to make school buildings more sustainable over the next 16 years.

110812.explanation: Splitting is allowed provided it is in consultation with the municipality.

110755.explanation: We have a good referendum regulation.

110756.explanation: Residents can adopt small green areas.

110758.explanation: The inland dune area should remain as undisturbed as possible.

110759.explanation: The municipality should encourage this option.

110762.explanation: The municipality must comply with the national distribution law.

110767.explanation: With 5 village centers...? Where exactly? Leave that to the larger municipalities.

110768.explanation: Yes, once per quarter. Good for circular use.

110771.explanation: We must be careful with the land within our municipality. The municipality should be able to exercise control itself.

110772.explanation: Sports are beneficial to everyone, not only for the body but also for social contacts.

110775.explanation: Music lessons at school are already subsidized. In addition, there is an income-dependent subsidy for the municipal music school.

110778.explanation: Definitely! It’s good if there is better attention to antisocial behavior, parking behavior, speeding, dog (and horse) feces, etc.

110779.explanation: We do not want to be monitored everywhere.

110781.explanation: Certainly. It already exists in our municipality. For us, Liberal Bloemendaal, this applies especially to young starters.

110785.explanation: Under strict conditions related to preserving the quality of the municipality.

110786.explanation: It is good to encourage people, within their possibilities, to actively participate in society. It remains a tailored approach.

110792.explanation: People should preferably be able to choose. Not necessarily always.

110805.explanation: Liberal Bloemendaal strives for such new construction that mobility within the housing market is stimulated.

110806.explanation: Does not fit the living environment and the character of the municipality.

110809.explanation: The infrastructure must be carefully reviewed before building. In some neighborhoods this is a major problem.

110812.explanation: Relaxing rules is not necessary because it can already be done now.

110813.explanation: Liberal Bloemendaal opposes patronizing, but residents must still consider others.

110755.explanation: As long as it is unknown who decides what is important, we are neither for nor against.

110758.explanation: Not always. It should be evaluated on a case-by-case basis.

110772.explanation: People with limited means already have access to various subsidies.

110754.explanation: Quality must be decisive. Diversity is important but concerns more than just male/female.

110755.explanation: The SP supports the introduction of a binding corrective referendum. As long as this is not legally in place, the municipality itself must allow low-threshold corrective referenda and respect the outcome.

110756.explanation: You cannot live together alone. Society belongs to, is for, and is by the residents. The SP therefore values participation, management, and real influence.

110758.explanation: Quality control may be necessary for a shop or campsite. Camping Vogelenzang should remain a family campsite.

110759.explanation: By generating sustainable energy yourself, you can save a lot and make an important contribution to a major social challenge. It’s a win-win situation.

110762.explanation: The SP is in favor of the distribution law. All municipalities must contribute to solving the accommodation shortage. More (temporary) accommodation locations are needed. Permanent housing receives no priority; every home seeker (who already lives or works in Bloemendaal) is equally urgent.

110767.explanation: Good alternative in case of (enforcement of) fireworks ban.

110768.explanation: Not everyone has a car to drop off bulky waste themselves.

110771.explanation: Housing construction requires planning. Project developers and other entrepreneurs (including farmers) build for profit, not to build qualitatively good and affordable homes.

110772.explanation: Sports are good for a healthy and social society. Everyone should be able to participate.

110775.explanation: The cultural development of children is a social interest.

110778.explanation: A safe society is important for everyone. Through the deployment of public officials (BOAs), the municipality can improve safety in public areas.

110779.explanation: The SP is cautious about camera surveillance on public roads. Privacy and digital autonomy are under pressure. The SP prefers police officers and community officials where necessary.

110781.explanation: For first-time buyers and young families without substantial wealth, owning a home is out of reach. The municipality can help reduce this inequality.

110785.explanation: Naturally, we must be careful with our natural environment, but the housing shortage requires creative solutions and needs space.

110786.explanation: Recipients of social assistance benefit from paid work. Mandatory volunteer work can only be allowed under conditions: no displacement of paid work (no unfair competition), demonstrably useful experience, and a stepping stone to paid work.

110790.explanation: In Bloemendaal, more and more people drive electric vehicles and depend on charging points. These are not always sufficiently available at present.

110792.explanation: Care providers must be able to care for everyone and be sensitive to cultural differences.

110793.explanation: Of course, a municipality must also be price-conscious and avoid expensive consortia where too much money ends up in overhead, but high-quality youth care must come first.

110805.explanation: That percentage must even be higher to catch up with the enormous backlog in the construction of social rental housing. But there is also a need for mid-range rental and specific homes for seniors.

110806.explanation: Naturally with attention to the surroundings and therefore a maximum building height, but the shortage of affordable housing does not allow a taboo on apartment buildings.

110809.explanation: Not in general. Only in neighborhoods where there is a structural shortage of parking spaces.

110811.explanation: 2030 is not feasible. All schools must be sustainable and climate-neutral by 2050.

110812.explanation: Houses are meant to be lived in, not for vacancy or maximum financial gain. Bloemendaal has relatively many large houses in which more households could live. Clear rules are needed to counteract price inflation.

110813.explanation: Wood burning must remain possible. This can only be allowed if the wood smoke and fine particles in the environment do not lead to irresponsible health risks for vulnerable groups.

statements.title: The municipality should ban burning wood on days when the air quality is poor.
The municipality should always allow farmers to open, for example, a shop or a campsite at their farm.
First-time homebuyers should be able to receive a starter loan from the municipality.

titleParts.text: Mensen die voor het eerst een huis willen kopen, moeten van de gemeente een

titleParts.glossary: An extra loan on top of your mortgage, which you can only get when buying a house for the first time.

statements.title: Every primary school child should be able to receive music lessons subsidized by the municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Money the government gives to citizens, businesses, and organizations to support them.

titleParts.text: van de gemeente muziekles kunnen krijgen.

statements.title: Residents of Bloemendaal should be able to give their opinion on important issues via a referendum.

titleParts.text: De inwoners van Bloemendaal moeten over belangrijke onderwerpen hun mening kunnen geven via een

titleParts.glossary: A public consultation where residents can express their opinion on a political issue. The municipal council is not obliged to follow the result; legally it cannot.

statements.title: People receiving social assistance should, in return, do socially useful work.

titleParts.glossary: Money from the municipality for people who have no income or personal funds.
For example cleaning the streets or keeping company and supporting elderly residents.

statements.title: At least 33% of newly built homes in Bloemendaal should be social rental housing. In the Netherlands, 28% of homes are currently social rentals.

titleParts.text: Van de nieuw te bouwen woningen in Bloemendaal moet minimaal 33% een

titleParts.glossary: A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

titleParts.text: zijn. In Nederland is nu 28% van de woningen een

titleParts.glossary: A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

statements.title: Residents who want to generate sustainable energy together should receive financial support from the municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Energy based on resources that are effectively infinite, such as sunlight and wind.

titleParts.text: op willen wekken, moeten financiële steun krijgen van de gemeente.

statements.title: Bloemendaal should have more municipal enforcement officers (BOAs) focused on safety.

titleParts.glossary: People who, for the municipality, check whether citizens and businesses comply with the rules.

titleParts.text: (boa’s) komen die zich met veiligheid bezighouden.

statements.title: The municipality should pay the membership fees for a sports club for people receiving social assistance.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet het lidmaatschap van een sportclub betalen voor mensen met een

titleParts.glossary: Money from the municipality for people who have no income or personal funds.

statements.title: Residents should be able to take over the management of, for example, a sports hall or a public green space from the municipality.
There should be more camera surveillance in Bloemendaal.

titleParts.glossary: Monitoring of a building, area, or (groups of) people using security cameras.

statements.title: The municipality should make at least half of the school buildings sustainable by 2030.
The municipality should organize a fireworks show on New Year's Eve.
The new college of mayor and aldermen must have an equal number of men and women.

titleParts.glossary: The college of mayor and aldermen, the municipality’s executive board.
The mayor leads the municipality and chairs the municipal council. The mayor is not elected but appointed by the national government, after recommendation by the municipal council.

titleParts.text: en wethouders moet het aantal mannen en vrouwen gelijk zijn.

statements.title: The municipality should prevent new construction outside existing village boundaries.
Bulky waste must be collected from homes free of charge.
The municipality should designate more parking spaces as charging points for electric cars.
People who need care should always be able to choose a caregiver who matches their religion, culture, or beliefs.

titleParts.text: Mensen die zorg nodig hebben, moeten altijd kunnen kiezen voor een zorgverlener die past bij hun geloof, cultuur of

titleParts.glossary: What someone believes about life, such as a religion or personal conviction.

statements.title: An asylum seekers' center (AZC) should be established in our municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Reception center for asylum seekers. They live there until it is decided whether they may stay in the Netherlands. An asylum seekers’ center remains in a municipality for a long time.

statements.title: More high-rise residential buildings should be allowed in Bloemendaal.
There should be more parking spaces in the neighborhoods.
It should be possible for farmers to build houses themselves on their land.
When selecting organizations for youth care, the municipality should primarily pay attention to price.
The municipality should relax the rules for splitting houses into multiple dwellings.
